cases.input: Assess delivery risk for migrating our orders service to Firestore before Q3, given a 2-person team and a 5-table legacy Postgres DB.
Estimate effort for a new onboarding platform with SSO, 6 core entities, and a data migration from a legacy DB.
Set a delivery budget baseline for the Q3 platform program across three workstreams.
Draft OKRs to make customer onboarding a competitive advantage this quarter for the product team.
Evaluate three managed-search vendors for our knowledge base against our criteria and recommend one.
Map the stakeholders for the payments migration and define a communication plan for the steering committee.
Help me plan delivery for next quarter — I need to figure out goals and what the team can actually take on.
Design the microservices architecture and write the deployment Terraform for the orders service.
Give me both the full risk register and the FTE-month estimate for the migration in one pass.
Define SLOs and an error budget for our public orders API targeting 99.9% availability.
Risk-assess this greenfield idea — we have almost no artifacts yet, just a one-paragraph concept.
Our three squads keep stepping on each other; recommend a team topology and interaction modes.
